case_title: LILI M. SEIF VS. SUSZNNA SHAW

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEIF, LILI M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAW, SUSZNNA $3,950.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,000.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY SUSZNNA SHAW IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO JUN-23-2010 AT 8:30 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. APPEARANCE BY MOVING PARTY ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEIF, LILI M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAW, SUSZNNA $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $570.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S FATHER ALI SEIF ONLY. MR. SEIF STATES THAT HIS DAUGHTER IS IN NEW YORK. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
